seoTitle: Leeming vs Leeuwin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Leeming and Leeuwin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leeming and Leeuwin.
heading: Leeming vs Leeuwin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leeming, Western Australia and Leeuwin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leeuwin has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Leeming (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leeming or Leeuwin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leeming has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Leeuwin scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leeming scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Leeuwin scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leeming or Leeuwin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leeuwin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
